name: Group
summary: A group is a special type of Entity that does not belong to a Layer and contains other Entitys as children. A Group's children may include other Groups, allowing for a hierarchical tree structure of Entitys. A Group must contain at least one child and will be automatically collapsed if an operation is performed that results in the Group being empty.

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Group.
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method creates a new Layout::Group.

throws.when: if entities contains Entitys that belong to different Documents
if entities contains a mix of Entitys that belong to a Document and Entitys that don't belong to a Document
if entities contains Entitys on both shared and non-shared Layers, or on non-shared Layers belonging to different Pages
if entities contains the same Entity more than once

methods.name: entities
methods.summary: The #entities method returns the Entities that belong to the Layout::Group.
methods.remarks: The #entities method returns the Entities that belong to the Layout::Group.

methods.name: remove_scale_factor
methods.summary: The #remove_scale_factor method removes the scale factor from the Layout::Group.
methods.remarks: The #remove_scale_factor method removes the scale factor from the Layout::Group. The resize behavior can be one of the following values: Layout::Group::RESIZE_BEHAVIOR_NONE Layout::Group::RESIZE_BEHAVIOR_BOUNDS Layout::Group::RESIZE_BEHAVIOR_BOUNDS_AND_FONTS

throws.when: if the Layout::Group does not have a scale factor
if the Layout::Group is on a locked layer

methods.name: scale_factor
methods.summary: The #scale_factor method returns the scale factor associated with the Layout::Group.
methods.remarks: The #scale_factor method returns the scale factor associated with the Layout::Group.

methods.name: set_scale_factor
methods.summary: The #set_scale_factor method sets the scale factor for the Layout::Group.
methods.remarks: The #set_scale_factor method sets the scale factor for the Layout::Group. The units format can be any of the following values: Layout::Document::FRACTIONAL_INCHES Layout::Document::DECIMAL_INCHES Layout::Document::DECIMAL_FEET Layout::Document::DECIMAL_MILLIMETERS Layout::Document::DECIMAL_CENTIMETERS Layout::Document::DECIMAL_METERS Layout::Document::DECIMAL_POINTS The resize behavior can be one of the following values: Layout::Group::RESIZE_BEHAVIOR_NONE Layout::Group::RESIZE_BEHAVIOR_BOUNDS Layout::Group::RESIZE_BEHAVIOR_BOUNDS_AND_FONTS

throws.when: if the Layout::Group is on a locked Layer
if scale_factor is an invalid value
if the Layout::Group cannot be assigned a scale factor because it is already inheriting a scale factor from its parent
if a scale factor cannot be set for the Layout::Group

methods.name: ungroup
methods.summary: The #ungroup method removes all Entitys from the Layout::Group and deletes the Layout::Group.
methods.remarks: The #ungroup method removes all Entitys from the Layout::Group and deletes the Layout::Group.

properties.name: scale_precision
properties.summary: The #scale_precision method returns the precision used for the scale of the Layout::Group.
properties.remarks: The #scale_precision method returns the precision used for the scale of the Layout::Group.

properties.name: scale_units
properties.summary: The #scale_units method returns the units format used in the scale for the Layout::Group.
properties.remarks: The #scale_units method returns the units format used in the scale for the Layout::Group. The units format can be any of the following values: Layout::Document::FRACTIONAL_INCHES Layout::Document::DECIMAL_INCHES Layout::Document::DECIMAL_FEET Layout::Document::DECIMAL_MILLIMETERS Layout::Document::DECIMAL_CENTIMETERS Layout::Document::DECIMAL_METERS Layout::Document::DECIMAL_POINTS
